# presentationContext

**Instance Property**

A delegate that provides media setup display information to the system.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var presentationContext: (any MSAuthenticationPresentationContext)? { get set }
```

## Presenting the Configuration View

- **MSAuthenticationPresentationContext**: A protocol that provides media setup display information to the system.
- **start()**: Initiates the service configuration process and sends the account details of the streaming media service to the user’s HomePod speakers.
